output:
"ok": False,
            "summary": "Governed phase exhausted automatic correction cycles",
            "job_id": req.get("job_id"),
            "run_id": attempts[-1]["author"]["run_id"] if attempts else None,
            "validation_cycles": cycles,
            "results": results,
        }

    # ---------- installation / rollback / finalize ----------
    def _load_install_manifest(self, workspace: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
        path = workspace / "approval/install-manifest.json"
        if not path.is_file():
            raise GovernedError("Install manifest is missing")
        value = load_json(path)
        if not isinstance(value, dict):
            raise GovernedError("Invalid install manifest")
        return value

    def install_candidate(self, req: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
        job_id = self._safe_job_id(req.get("job_id"))
        token = req.get("approval_token")
        expected_token = f"JOSE_APPROVED_LIVE_INSTALL:{job_id}"
        if token != expected_token:
            raise GovernedError("Exact Jose live-install approval token is required")
        workspace = self._workspace_from_request(req)
        manifest = self._load_install_manifest(workspace)
        if manifest.get("job_id") != job_id:
            raise GovernedError("Install manifest job mismatch")
        job = self._load_job(job_id)
        state = self._load_controller_state()
        if state.get("current_job_id") != job_id or job.get("status") != "awaiting_approval":
            raise GovernedError("Job/controller state is not awaiting approval")
        if job.get("approval_id") != manifest.get("approval_id"):
            raise GovernedError("Approval ID mismatch")
        candidate_root = workspace / "candidate"
        targets = [item["path"] for item in manifest["target_files"]]
        with self._lock("install_candidate"):
            for rel in targets:
                _, live = self._safe_rel(rel, purpose="target")
                expected_live = manifest["live_hashes"].get(rel)
                current = sha256_file(live) if live.is_file() else None
                if current != expected_live:
                    raise GovernedError(f"Live target changed since validation: {rel}")
            backup = self._snapshot_paths(f"governed-install-{job_id}", targets)
            for item in manifest["target_files"]:
                rel = item["path"]
                candidate = candidate_root / rel
                if not candidate.is_file() or sha256_file(candidate) != item["sha256"]:
                    raise GovernedError(f"Candidate hash mismatch: {rel}")
            installed: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
            try:
                for item in manifest["target_files"]:
                    rel = item["path"]
                    candidate = candidate_root / rel
                    _, live = self._safe_rel(rel, purpose="target")
                    mode = live.stat().st_mode & 0o777 if live.exists() else 0o644
                    atomic_write_bytes(live, candidate.read_bytes(), mode=mode)
                    if sha256_file(live) != item["sha256"]:
                        raise GovernedError(f"Installed hash mismatch: {rel}")
                    if live.suffix == ".py":
                        compile(live.read_text(encoding="utf-8"), str(live), "exec")
                    elif live.suffix in {".sh", ".bash"}:
                        check = self._run(["bash", "-n", str(live)])
                        if check.returncode != 0:
                            raise GovernedError(f"Installed shell syntax failed: {rel}: {check.stderr}")
                    installed.append({"path": rel, "sha256": sha256_file(live)})
            except Exception:
                self._restore_snapshot(backup)
                raise
            installation = {
                "schema_version": "1.0",
                "installed_at": iso_now(),
                "job_id": job_id,
                "run_id": workspace.name,
                "backup_directory": str(backup.relative_to(self.repo)),
                "files": installed,
                "controller_tick_performed": False,
                "scheduler_change_performed": False,
                "service_change_performed": False,
            }
            install_record = workspace / "installation.json"
            atomic_write_json(install_record, installation)
            job["current_step"] = "candidate installed; awaiting read-only verification and phase finalization approval"
            job.setdefault("artifacts", []).append(
                {
                    "type": "governed_installation_record",
                    "path": str(install_record.relative_to(self.repo)),
                    "sha256": sha256_file(install_record),
                    "run_id": workspace.name,
                }
            )
            self._save_job(job)
            atomic_write_json(
                workspace / "run-state.json",
                {
                    "job_id": job_id,
                    "run_id": workspace.name,
                    "status": "installed_pending_verification",
                    "backup_directory": str(backup.relative_to(self.repo)),
                    "updated_at": iso_now(),
                },
            )
            result = {
                "ok": True,
                "summary": "Candidate installed; phase remains awaiting verification/finalization",
                "job_id": job_id,
                "run_id": workspace.name,
                "installed_files": installed,
                "backup_directory": str(backup.relative_to(self.repo)),
                "finalize_approval_statement": f"JOSE_APPROVED_PHASE_FINALIZE:{job_id}",
                "controller_tick_performed": False,
                "scheduler_change_performed": False,
            }
            self._audit("install_candidate", req, result)
            return result

    def _restore_snapshot(self, backup: Path) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
        manifest = load_json(backup / "manifest.json")
        restored: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        for item in manifest["files"]:
            rel = item["path"]
            _, live = self._safe_rel(rel, purpose="target")
            if item["exists"]:
                source = backup / "files" / rel
                if not source.is_file():
                    raise GovernedError(f"Backup source missing: {rel}")
                mode = live.stat().st_mode & 0o777 if live.exists() else 0o644
                atomic_write_bytes(live, source.read_bytes(), mode=mode)
                restored.append({"path": rel, "sha256": sha256_file(live)})
            else:
                if live.exists():
                    live.unlink()
                restored.append({"path": rel, "removed": True})
        return restored

    def rollback_candidate(self, req: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
        job_id = self._safe_job_id(req.get("job_id"))
        token = req.get("approval_token")
        if token != f"JOSE_APPROVED_ROLLBACK:{job_id}":
            raise GovernedError("Exact Jose rollback approval token is required")
        backup_raw = req.get("backup_directory")
        if not isinstance(backup_raw, str) or not backup_raw.startswith(".chatgpt_backups/governed-install-"):
            raise GovernedError("A governed install backup directory is required")
        backup = (self.repo / backup_raw).resolve()
        if self.repo not in backup.parents or not backup.is_dir():
            raise GovernedErro
